funFacts: The Saber-toothed Tiger on Rocky Outlook is a solitary hunter and excellent swimmer, often bathing in rivers to stay cool in the heat.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing blending pastel shades using wax crayons or markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about natural botany and organic patterns while developing fine motor coordination.
